mapper.select: SELECT EVENT_ID, TITLE, WRITER_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, CREATED_AT FROM EVENT ORDER BY EVENT_ID DESC LIMIT ${index}, ${amount}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVENT (TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer_id}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, 'Y', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE EVENT SET EVENT_ID = EVENT_ID WHERE EVENT_ID = #{event_id}
